negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: physics_057
prompt: A minimalist video showcases a blue rectangular wooden block placed upright on a black rotating turntable. The turntable is positioned on a wooden surface, and the scene is dimly lit, with a spotlight casting a long, curved shadow on the wall behind it. As the turntable rotates clockwise, the shadow shifts dynamically, creating a mesmerizing optical effect. The block remains stationary, while the interplay of light and shadow evolves, emphasizing the geometric shapes and the interplay of light and motion. The video concludes with the same serene setup, maintaining the static nature of the objects and the consistent lighting, highlighting the beauty of simple yet captivating visual dynamics.
